Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients.text: Ricotta Soft Cheese and Spinach Flavoured Filling

ingredients_text: 62% Egg Pasta (Durum Wheat Semolina, Wheat Flour, 15% Egg, Water), 38% Ricotta Soft Cheese and Spinach Flavoured Filling (40% Ricotta Soft Cheese (Milk), 29% Spinach, Breadcrumbs [Wheat Flour, Yeast, Salt], Whey Powder (Milk), Grated Hard Cheese (Milk), Sunflower Oil, Cream (Milk), Salt, Natural Flavouring, Nutmeg).
